# Qwickword

> Qwickword is a free, no-signup video calling tool. You pick a time limit
> (2 to 30 minutes), get a shareable link, and the call ends automatically
> the moment the timer hits zero — there's no way to extend it.

## What it does

- Creates a single-use video call link with a hard time limit set by the
  creator.
- No account, no download, no installation — the call runs in the browser.
- The countdown starts once a second person joins the call (or the creator
  manually starts it), not the moment the link is created, so the link can
  sit unopened without wasting the call's own time.
- When the timer reaches zero, the call ends for everyone — there is no
  extend button and no way to rejoin the same link afterward.
- Participants can also vote to end the call early, before the timer runs
  out.

## Who it's for

People who want a meeting, catch-up, or quick video chat that is guaranteed
not to run long — the opposite of a video call tool designed to keep people
on it indefinitely.

## Site

- Homepage (create a link): https://qwickword.com
- About / manifesto: https://qwickword.com/manifesto
